titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Hakam Ibn Hakim, the Nephew of Khallad
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Hakam Ibn Hakim, the Nephew of Khallad

segments: ه عن حكم بن حكيم ابن أخي خلّاد فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه؛ و عبد اللّه بن جعفر الحميريّ، عن أحمد بن أبي عبد اللّه البرقيّ، عن أبيه، عن محمّد بن أبي عمير، عن حكم بن حكيم‌.
arabic.text: ه عن حكم بن حكيم ابن أخي خلّاد فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه؛ و عبد اللّه بن جعفر الحميريّ، عن أحمد بن أبي عبد اللّه البرقيّ، عن أبيه، عن محمّد بن أبي عمير، عن حكم بن حكيم‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Hakam ibn Hakim, the nephew of Khallad, has been transmitted by me from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them both - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah and Abdullah ibn Ja'far Al-Himyari, from Ahmad ibn Abi Abdullah Al-Barqi, from his father, from Muhammad ibn Abi 'Umayr, from Hakam ibn Hakim.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Hakam ibn Hakim, the nephew of Khallad, has been transmitted by me from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them both - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah and Abdullah ibn Ja'far Al-Himyari, from Ahmad ibn Abi Abdullah Al-Barqi, from his father, from Muhammad ibn Abi 'Umayr, from Hakam ibn Hakim.
